title: Radiation emitting devices - Canada.ca
content:
## Radiation emitting devices
Information on radiation emitting devices, legislation and safety codes.

## Services and information

### Radiation Emitting Devices Act and Regulations
What the Act and Regulations cover, general requirements and exceptions, and other applicable Acts.

### Radiation safety codes
What safety codes are, who may require and enforce them, and codes for specific types of radiation emitting devices.

### Everyday  things that emit radiation
We use and are surrounded by products and devices that give off radiation. How to use them and protect your health.
